title: leptorkis bicornis
intro: Leptorkis bicornis, also known as the two-horned orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Leptorkis bicornis include treating fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a tonic to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Leptorkis bicornis typically involve boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
